sourcesContent:
<template>
  <el-dialog
    title="编辑求职意向"
    v-model="dialogVisible"
    width="500px"
    :close-on-click-modal="false"
  >
    <el-form
      ref="formRef"
      :model="form"
      :rules="rules"
      label-width="100px"
      class="job-intention-form"
    >
      <!-- 工作类型 -->
      <el-form-item label="工作类型" prop="job_type">
        <el-select v-model="form.job_type" placeholder="请选择工作类型">
          <el-option
            v-for="option in JOB_TYPE_OPTIONS"
            :key="option.value"
            :label="option.label"
            :value="option.value"
          />
        </el-select>
      </el-form-item>

      <!-- 求职状态 -->
      <el-form-item label="求职状态" prop="job_status">
        <el-select v-model="form.job_status" placeholder="请选择求职状态">
          <el-option
            v-for="option in JOB_STATUS_OPTIONS"
            :key="option.value"
            :label="option.label"
            :value="option.value"
          />
        </el-select>
      </el-form-item>

      <!-- 期望薪资 -->
      <el-form-item label="期望薪资" prop="expected_salary">
        <el-select v-model="form.expected_salary" placeholder="请选择期望薪资">
          <el-option
            v-for="option in SALARY_OPTIONS"
            :key="option.value"
            :label="option.label"
            :value="option.value"
          />
        </el-select>
      </el-form-item>

      <!-- 期望城市 -->
      <el-form-item label="期望城市" prop="expected_city">
        <el-cascader
          v-model="selectedCities"
          :options="cityOptions"
          :props="{ multiple: true }"
          placeholder="请选择期望城市"
          @change="handleCityChange"
        />
      </el-form-item>

      <!-- 期望行业 -->
      <el-form-item label="期望行业" prop="industries">
        <el-select
          v-model="form.industries"
          multiple
          filterable
          allow-create
          placeholder="请选择或输入期望行业"
        >
          <el-option
            v-for="industry in industryOptions"
            :key="industry.value"
            :label="industry.label"
            :value="industry.value"
          />
        </el-select>
      </el-form-item>
    </el-form>

    <template #footer>
      <el-button @click="dialogVisible = false">取消</el-button>
      <el-button type="primary" @click="handleSubmit" :loading="loading">
        保存
      </el-button>
    </template>
  </el-dialog>
</template>

<script setup>
import { ref, computed, watch } from 'vue'
import { JOB_TYPE_OPTIONS, JOB_STATUS_OPTIONS, SALARY_OPTIONS } from '../constants/jobOptions'
import { cityOptions } from '../constants/cityOptions'
import { industryOptions } from '../constants/industryOptions'

const props = defineProps({
  modelValue: Boolean,
  initialData: {
    type: Object,
    default: () => ({})
  },
  loading: Boolean
})

const emit = defineEmits(['update:modelValue', 'submit'])

// 表单数据
const form = ref({
  job_type: '',
  job_status: '',
  expected_salary: '',
  expected_city: '',
  industries: []
})

// 监听初始数据变化
watch(() => props.initialData, (newVal) => {
  if (newVal) {
    form.value = {
      ...form.value,
      ...newVal
    }
    // 解析城市数据
    if (newVal.expected_city) {
      selectedCities.value = newVal.expected_city.split('-')
    }
  }
}, { immediate: true })

// 城市选择
const selectedCities = ref([])
const handleCityChange = (value) => {
  form.value.expected_city = value.join('-')
}

// 表单验证规则
const rules = {
  job_type: [{ required: true, message: '请选择工作类型', trigger: 'change' }],
  job_status: [{ required: true, message: '请选择求职状态', trigger: 'change' }]
}

// 对话框可见性
const dialogVisible = computed({
  get: () => props.modelValue,
  set: (val) => emit('update:modelValue', val)
})

// 提交表单
const handleSubmit = async () => {
  emit('submit', form.value)
}
</script>

<style scoped>
.job-intention-form {
  padding: 20px;
}
</style>
